finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_03.md:175; chapters/chapter_03.md:201; chapters/chapter_03.md:205; chapters/chapter_03.md:265; chapters/chapter_03.md:275; chapters/chapter_03.md:283
finding_results.notes: Four targeted edits across the negotiation and ring scenes. (1) Line 175: Kem's information demand now arrives through self-correction ('If I'm -- look,') instead of a clean conditional argument. (2) Lines 201-207: Kem's disclosure condition rewritten with interrupted phrasing ('I just -- I need to know when I'm not seeing the whole thing') replacing the balanced parallel structure ('Not the content if you won't. Not yet if you think yet matters'); narrator certification 'Smart. Annoying.' removed entirely; 'I appreciate the honesty. I dislike it, but I appreciate it' (balanced aphoristic response) replaced with plainer 'I don't like that.' (3) Lines 265-275: Ring scene narrator-diagnosis ('For a moment he looked genuinely split, not between good and bad but between old meanings and immediate pain') removed and replaced with behavioral showing ('His thumb turned the ring once, slowly'); 'Deep reflex. Old training.' also cut since the physical action already conveys instinct. (4) Line 283: Kem's thematic button ('I did, apparently, walk out wearing enough decorative hardware to buy practical life') replaced with plainer self-interrupting observation ('These were just -- what you wear to a Rite. I didn't think of them as money'). All four beats still land their dramatic functions: disclosure condition established, ring admission forced, class awareness registered. None resolves into balanced mini-speech or narrator-certified insight.

summary: Single finding addressed across four localized edits. Roughened Kem's negotiation dialogue at two points so his information demands arrive through self-correction and plain phrasing rather than balanced rhetoric. Removed narrator certification of dialogue impact at the disclosure-condition beat and the ring scene. Replaced thematic-button class-awareness line with plainer spoken observation. All dramatic functions preserved; no collateral changes to surrounding text, continuity, or chapter architecture.
